title: Day 41 -  Kanji Practice
html:
Day 41 - Kanji Practice

Please download today's kanji practice here: Kanji Practice Day 41.pdf

Practising writing kanji every day is a very important exercise to help you learn quickly. If you have any questions you can always ask other students and teachers in the community here.

Refer back to the Week 9 - Kanji lesson to watch how to do the correct stroke order for the 読, 見 & 聞 kanji.
